summary: Proof-worth registry entries owned by build-tooling.

entries.contract: Repo-mode builds are content-based, stay raw direct swiftc output, do not post-sign or gate on spctl, and emit the manual TCC handoff only after real rebuilds.
entries.worth: This protects raw rebuild and 137 recovery behavior without touching the real repo-mode binary or macOS TCC state.
entries.guard: uses a temporary fake repo and fake toolchain
